title: Crystalline polymorphs of 4-bromo-2,5-dimethoxyphenethylamine (2c-b)
abstract: The disclosure relates in some aspects to solid forms of 4-bromo-2,5-dimethoxyphenethylamine (2C-B), such as crystalline polymorphs. In some aspects, the disclosure relates to crystalline Polymorph 1 of 2C-B hydrobromide (HBr). In other aspects, the disclosure provides methods of making the solid forms, compositions comprising the solid forms, and methods of using such solid forms, including their administration to subjects, for example to modulate neurotransmission, increase neuroplasticity or neurogenesis, or treat a medical condition, such as a mental, behavioral, or neurodevelopmental disorder, a neurodegenerative disorder, or a pain disorder.
